name: Oven-Crisped Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 cups toasted rice cereal, coarsely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a large roasting rack with nonstick cooking spray and place it in a large roasting pan.
3. Sprinkle the chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
4. Place flour in a shallow dish.
5. In a small bowl, combine eggs and milk; whisk until well mixed.
6. In a large bowl, mix cereal crumbs and garlic powder thoroughly.
7. Dip each chicken piece first in flour, then egg mixture, then cereal mixture, coating completely each time.
8. Place the coated pieces on the rack.
9. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until no pink remains and juices run clear.
Serves: 4 to 6
Notes: You may want to add some onion powder, an Italian or Greek seasoning blend, or a little "heat".
